english translation text: From the killing fields arose the cry,No one remains; there is a lull all around,
Who has been looted in this foreign land?No one remains; there is a lull all around
God! What a scene before our eyes!Every corpse headless lies!
Flows here a river of blood,No one remains; there is a lull all around
The enveloping air is sorrowful today,There is no one to tend to the corpses,

urdu transliteration text:
Grieving clouds have covered the heavens,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

english translation text: Some tents can be seen in the distance - all incinerated,
And dried, broken little mugs too,Was this a caravan of thirsty people?
Who is this prince whose corpse here lies?O! How was his chest wounded?
Which mother has Fate afflicted with this grief?There are two corpses of identical length,
Drenched in a sea of blood,Both have been looted by death
There is a lion who lies at the river bank,His persona still caries such a charm,
That the breeze blows gently (by his corpse),
Here lies a little grave,And nearby lies a cradle too,Who killed this sinless child?
Sorrow blankets all directions,O! Who has fallen asleep upon the arrows?

urdu transliteration text:
Without shroud or coffin lies his corpse,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

english translation text: O Munawwar! how stunned was the person (i.e. Munawwar),(When he heard) some Lady's voice, “My family has been destroyed”
